meaning: adj.闈炲畼鏂圭殑,闈炴硶瀹氱殑,闈炴寮忕殑
examples: Unofficial estimates put the figure at over two million.
An unofficial grey market in the shares has been operating for about two weeks.
He assisted in unofficial ways with the routine legwork in various investigations.
Siegel added that the workers had no employment rights since they had taken unofficial strike action.
The observation desk is also witness to proposals of marriage almost daily, according to unofficial tallies.
